name: Cluster
description: Cluster schema from Amazon EKS API

arn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the cluster.

createdAt.description: The Unix epoch timestamp at object creation.

version.description: The Kubernetes server version for the cluster.

endpoint.description: The endpoint for your Kubernetes API server.

roleArn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the IAM role.

status.description: The current status of the cluster.

platformVersion.description: The platform version of your Amazon EKS cluster.

tags.description: Metadata that assists with categorization and organization.
